title: To Julia (2)
content:
Julia, when thy Herrick dies,
Close thou up thy poet's eyes;
And his last breath, let it be
Taken in by none but thee.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "To Julia (2)"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
